comment: Windows path to the private content repo the experiments ran against (any drive, any username, single or doubled separators)
Git-Bash form of the same path
Claude Code session-log folder slug for that checkout (~/.claude/projects/<slug>)
Fallback: any other path under a user home directory keeps only its tail

Test-fixture dirs under Temp/ are named after the private app the experiments audit; the path prefix rules above stop at the repo root, so the app name survived downstream. Keep the fixture role, drop the name (wildcarded, so this file never spells the string it removes).
